Business runs smarter on Windows 11 Pro

Secure, AI-ready, and built for modern work to help teams move faster and keep IT in control.

Explore Windows 11 Pro

Upgrade to Windows 11

Key benefits
  • Key benefits
  •  Results in action
  •  Explore devices
  • Plan your upgrade
  • Stay informed

Windows 11 Pro: Real results for the way your business works.

Designed to reduce friction across operations, Windows 11 Pro turns advanced security, smarter productivity, and streamlined IT into tangible performance and efficiency gains organizations can measure.

  • Protect your organization with hardware-backed defenses like Windows Hello, BitLocker, Pluton, and advanced device-to-cloud safeguards that keep data secure by default.

    Learn more

  • Help employees work more efficiently with AI-powered workflows 1, Copilot 2, snap layouts, focus tools, and collaboration experiences designed to keep teams moving. 

    Learn more

  • Experience fast startup times, long battery life 5, and optimized hardware that powers high-performing workstyles across your fleet.

    Learn more

  • Simplify management with scalable deployment, remote onboarding, automated updates, and flexible policy controls that help keep IT in control and operations running smoothly.

    Learn more

The proof is in the numbers

Businesses who shift to Windows 11 report fewer incidents, faster performance, and stronger productivity across their fleets. 

Organizations upgrading to Windows 11 Pro report up to 58% fewer security incidents compared to legacy systems.3

Forrester TEI study reports 20% productivity gains when employees work on next-gen AI PCs.

Windows 11 Pro devices deliver up to 42% faster completion 6 of demanding workloads compared to Windows 10 PCs.

Windows 11 Pro streamlines deployment with modern device management, enabling up to 25% faster device rollout.

Windows 11 Pro: Real results for the way your business works.

Designed to reduce friction across operations, Windows 11 Pro turns advanced security, smarter productivity, and streamlined IT into tangible performance and efficiency gains organizations can measure.

  • Protect your organization with hardware-backed defenses like Windows Hello, BitLocker, Pluton, and advanced device-to-cloud safeguards that keep data secure by default.

    Learn more

  • Help employees work more efficiently with AI-powered workflows 1, Copilot 2, snap layouts, focus tools, and collaboration experiences designed to keep teams moving. 

    Learn more

  • Experience fast startup times, long battery life, and optimized hardware that powers high-performing workstyles across your fleet.

    Learn more

  • Simplify management with scalable deployment, remote onboarding, automated updates, and flexible policy controls that help keep IT in control and operations running smoothly.

    Learn more

The proof is in the numbers

Businesses who shift to Windows 11 report fewer incidents, faster performance, and stronger productivity across their fleets. 

Organizations upgrading to Windows 11 Pro report up to 58% fewer security incidents compared to legacy systems.3

Forrester TEI study reports  20% productivity gains when employees work on next-gen AI PCs. 

Modern Windows 11 Pro devices deliver up to 30% faster boot times and reduced downtime.

Windows 11 Pro streamlines deployment and management, boosting IT efficiency and device rollout by up to 25%.

Windows 11 Pro: Real results for the way your business works.

Designed to reduce friction across operations, Windows 11 Pro turns advanced security, smarter productivity, and streamlined IT into tangible performance and efficiency gains organizations can measure.

  • Protect your organization with hardware-backed defenses like Windows Hello, BitLocker, Pluton, and advanced device-to-cloud safeguards that keep data secure by default.

    Learn more

  • Help employees work more efficiently with AI-powered workflows 1, Copilot 2, snap layouts, focus tools, and collaboration experiences designed to keep teams moving. 

    Learn more

  • Experience fast startup times, long battery life, and optimized hardware that powers high-performing workstyles across your fleet.

    Learn more

  • Simplify management with scalable deployment, remote onboarding, automated updates, and flexible policy controls that help keep IT in control and operations running smoothly.

    Learn more

The proof is in the numbers

Businesses who shift to Windows 11 report fewer incidents, faster performance, and stronger productivity across their fleets. 

Organizations upgrading to Windows 11 Pro report up to 58% fewer security incidents compared to legacy systems.3

Forrester TEI study reports  20% productivity gains when employees work on next-gen AI PCs. 

Modern Windows 11 Pro devices deliver up to 30% faster boot times and reduced downtime.

Windows 11 Pro streamlines deployment and management, boosting IT efficiency and device rollout by up to 25%.

See how businesses win with Windows 11 Pro

Results in action: From faster workflows to stronger security, discover how organizations succeed with Windows 11 Pro.

“On Windows 11 Pro, our developers, engineers, and other team members have multifactor authentication to keep data and devices secure.”

— Mark Khachaturian, CEO, Wellvii

Read customer story

“Windows 11 balances the tension between user experience and security.”

— Charles Pizzato, EGM, Technology Infrastructure, Suncorp

Read customer story

“With Windows Autopatch, we cut deployment time from 90 minutes to 25.”

— Paul McKenna, Head of Workplace and Contact Centre Infrastructure, Westpac

Read customer story

“We naturally considered other OS choices, but only Windows could support the 600 business apps we use in-house."

— Naoto Mori, IT Architect, IT Service Group, Information Management & Technology Unit, INPEX CORPORATION

Read customer story

Proven outcomes for today’s businesses

According to Forrester and IDC studies, organizations upgrading to Windows 11 Pro and deploying next-generation AI PCs report measurable improvements in security posture, employee satisfaction, and operational efficiency, alongside reduced IT management time and accelerated ROI. 4

See Forrester Study See IDC Study

Proven outcomes for today’s businesses

According to Forrester and IDC studies, organizations upgrading to Windows 11 Pro and deploying next-generation AI PCs report measurable improvements in security posture, employee satisfaction, and operational efficiency, alongside reduced IT management time and accelerated ROI. 4

See Forrester Study See IDC Study

Stay informed

Subscribe to our Windows for Business Newsletter to receive the latest product news, security tips, and productivity insights directly to your inbox.

Subscribe now

Your top questions, answered.

|

  • Many Windows 10 Pro devices already meet the requirements for Windows 11 Pro. Check whether your devices are eligible by visiting the Can I upgrade to Windows 11? page, or work with your IT provider to plan deployment at scale. To outfit your team with new devices, explore Windows 11 Pro PCs that meet your business needs.

  • Copilot+ PCs are a new category of Windows devices with built-in NPUs (neural processing units) designed to accelerate on-device AI workloads. These devices enable faster performance for supported AI experiences, improved efficiency, and longer battery life 5, helping power modern, AI‑enabled workflows on Windows.

  • Yes. Windows 11 Pro includes hardware-backed protections, enhanced phishing safeguards, memory integrity enabled by default, and continuous OS hardening, making it Microsoft’s most secure version of Windows for business.

  • You can purchase devices directly from Microsoft, work with a certified partner, or choose from authorized resellers. For larger organizations, Microsoft partners can assist with deployment and modernization planning.

  • Windows 11 Pro is considered an enterprise-grade operating system because it’s built to support the security, control, and scalability businesses need as they grow. It includes advanced features like device encryption, secure sign-in options, and built-in protection against modern threats, helping keep company data safer whether employees are working in the office or remotely. Complete with AI tools for business and enterprise-grade security, Windows 11 Pro is a business operating system that helps organizations run efficiently while supporting long-term device management.
  • [1] Windows 11 Survey Report. Techaisle, September 2024. Study commissioned by Microsoft. Results are self‑reported by surveyed organizations and are in comparison with Windows 10 devices; results will vary by organization.
  • [2] Microsoft 365 Copilot requires a per‑user license; sold separately.
  • [3] Performance claims vary by device and configuration. See Windows performance claims and test methodology: aka.ms/cpclaims and aka.ms/ window performancelab.
  • [4] Sources: (a) New Tech: The Projected Total Economic Impact™ of Microsoft Copilot+ PCs. Microsoft-commissioned study by Forrester Consulting, July 2025. Projected benefits for a single composite organization that has US$1 billion annual revenue and 2,000 employees with 80% using Copilot+ PCs. In comparison to a mixed environment of conventional Windows 11 and Windows 10 PCs. (b) IDC Report on AI PCs (2024), IDC Custom Solutions; sponsored by Microsoft. Findings and benefits may vary by organization. 
  • [5] Battery life varies significantly by device and with settings, usage, and other factors. See Windows Performance Lab.
  • [6] Results based on comparison with Windows 10 PCs. Performance varies significantly by device, configuration, usage, and other factors. Based on testing conducted by Principled Technologies.
